caption: A woman with black hair and glasses stands against a solid black background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved tunic with red and white embroidered detailing around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lavalier microphone is clipped to her garment. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a circular logo accompanies the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman speaks, her mouth open and eyes focused forward. She uses her hands to emphasize her points, moving them from a low position in front of her chest to a wider gesture, with her palms facing each other and fingers spread. Her expressions remain professional and engaged as she gestures dynamically while speaking.
